subject: Action needed: meeting planning in Perth | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-9421
body: Intelligence from Perth indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the meeting banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Albert Einstein. Reference initiative INIT-9421. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: delivery, drop-bears.
